scope.purpose: Verify the shared React/Vite Matrix visual runtime before it is used by the full user/admin redesign phases.

module-checks.check-4: Chrome/Playwright screenshot audit: /login user shell desktop 1440x900, 390x844, and reduced-motion.
module-checks.check-5: Chrome/Playwright screenshot audit: admin /login shell desktop 1440x900, 390x844, and reduced-motion.
module-checks.check-6: git diff --name-only -- install.sh deploy nginx docker-compose.yml
module-checks.check-7: Phase-53 user route screenshot audit: auth, dashboard, config, subscription, referrals, settings, and reduced-motion dashboard.
module-checks.check-8: Phase-54 local static admin route smoke: /login, /, /users, /devices, /mtproto, /servers, /plans, /analytics, pointer-safe overlays, reduced-motion markers, and protected-surface guard; authenticated screenshots remain clean-deploy follow-up.
module-checks.check-9: Phase-59 motion smoke: route motion, reduced-motion, pointer-scroll, keyboard focus, inactive-tab lifecycle, and protected backend/deploy/runtime guard.
module-checks.check-10: Phase-67 auth/splash smoke: MatrixBackground must tolerate canvas context failure, missing or legacy matchMedia listener APIs, reduced-motion, resize cleanup, and static fallback without console errors.

phase-53-runtime-gates.gate-1: MatrixBackground remains mounted once through VisualShell while user route navigation changes content.
phase-53-runtime-gates.gate-2: Canvas and CRT overlays remain pointer-events-none and do not intercept VPN config download, copy, QR, tariff checkout, MTProto copy/open, or auth form controls.
phase-53-runtime-gates.gate-3: Reduced-motion mode renders a readable static Matrix surface across dashboard/config/subscription routes without running animation loops.
phase-53-runtime-gates.gate-4: Runtime cleanup markers remain available after route navigation, hot reload, unmount, hidden-tab pause, and resize paths.
phase-53-runtime-gates.gate-5: Phase-53 smoke must fail if Matrix runtime changes deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose or backend runtime topology.

phase-54-runtime-gates.gate-1: Admin VisualShell keeps exactly one pointer-safe MatrixBackground mount while protected route content changes.
phase-54-runtime-gates.gate-2: Canvas and CRT overlays remain pointer-events-none and do not intercept admin login, navigation, search, pagination, confirmation, form, MTProto action, or chart controls.
phase-54-runtime-gates.gate-3: Reduced-motion mode renders a static readable Matrix admin shell without running animation loops on login and protected route smoke.
phase-54-runtime-gates.gate-4: Admin route smoke records no console errors from canvas init, resize, hidden-tab pause, cleanup, or unavailable canvas context branches.
phase-54-runtime-gates.gate-5: Phase-54 smoke must fail if Matrix runtime changes deploy/install/nginx/docker-compose or backend runtime topology.

phase-67-runtime-gates.gate-1: User splash/auth Matrix runtime must use browser feature detection instead of assuming modern matchMedia addEventListener support.
phase-67-runtime-gates.gate-2: Canvas 2D context unavailable, zero-size canvas, inactive tab, reduced-motion, and unmount paths must exit cleanly without uncaught errors or duplicate animation loops.
phase-67-runtime-gates.gate-3: Fallback rendering must remain readable and pointer-events-none on /, /login, /register, /forgot-password, and /reset-password.
phase-67-runtime-gates.gate-4: Phase-67 must not change admin runtime behavior except through shared guards that keep existing admin smokes green.

scenarios.scenario-1: Matrix canvas renders nonblank behind user and admin content without intercepting clicks, keyboard focus, text selection, or mobile scroll.
scenarios.scenario-2: VisualShell keeps content in a higher readable layer while the canvas and CRT overlays remain pointer-events-none.
scenarios.scenario-3: Resize recomputes canvas dimensions and drop columns without accumulating duplicate listeners or animation loops.
scenarios.scenario-4: Reduced-motion mode renders a static readable Matrix frame and suppresses requestAnimationFrame loops.
scenarios.scenario-5: Canvas 2D context is unavailable; runtime logs a controlled fallback marker and the app remains usable.
scenarios.scenario-6: Route navigation and component unmount cancel animation frames, timers, and listeners.

evidence-levels.module-local: Static smoke inspects source contracts, exported components, cleanup paths, reduced-motion branches, and protected imports.
evidence-levels.wave-level: User and admin frontend builds prove shared runtime integration across both apps.
evidence-levels.phase-level: Screenshot/pixel checks prove nonblank canvas, readable content, and reduced-motion behavior on desktop and mobile.

redaction.rule-1: Do not log user emails, access tokens, proxy secrets, tg links, VPN config contents, admin tokens, raw IP history, or screenshot binary data.
redaction.rule-2: Allowed telemetry: viewport dimensions, runtime branch, canvas support state, reduced-motion state, and animation lifecycle state.

autonomous-execution-safety.allowed: Implement frontend-only runtime, shell mounts, and smoke checks inside M-070 boundaries.
autonomous-execution-safety.blocked: Changing backend APIs, auth state, billing, VPN, MTProto provisioning, deploy/install scripts, nginx, docker-compose, or production runtime topology.
autonomous-execution-safety.handoff-trigger: Stop and report if screenshot checks show blank canvas, unreadable content, input interception, or reduced-motion failure.

acceptance.target-1: User and admin frontend builds pass.
acceptance.target-2: Phase-52 smoke passes with runtime lifecycle, protected surface, and redaction checks.
acceptance.target-3: Canvas nonblank and reduced-motion screenshot checks pass on mobile and desktop.
acceptance.target-4: No protected deploy/install/runtime surface changes are present.

local-2026-06-03.command-4: Chrome headless screenshot audit for user/admin /login at 360x740, 390x844, 430x932, 1440x900, plus --force-prefers-reduced-motion=reduce at 390x844.
local-2026-06-03.protected-surface: No install.sh, deploy, nginx, docker-compose, or runtime topology diff.

phase-53-local-2026-06-03.command-3: Chrome production-preview screenshot proof for /login, /register, /reset-password, desktop /login, and reduced-motion /login with virtual-time-budget.
phase-53-local-2026-06-03.protected-surface: No install.sh, deploy, nginx, docker-compose, or runtime topology diff.

phase-54-verification-design-2026-06-03.summary: Phase-54 runtime gates require admin VisualShell/MatrixBackground proof across login and protected admin routes, pointer-safe overlays, reduced-motion fallback, console-error guard, and protected deploy/install/runtime isolation.

phase-54-local-2026-06-03.summary: Static runtime proof passed for admin VisualShell/MatrixBackground source integration, pointer-events-none overlays, reduced-motion admin markers, route matrix markers, and protected deploy/install/runtime isolation.
phase-54-local-2026-06-03.follow-up: Authenticated protected-route screenshot review remains clean-deploy follow-up because this local execution did not run a real admin backend session.

phase-59-local-2026-06-04.summary: VisualShell route motion markers and MatrixBackground reduced-motion, pointer-scroll, and inactive-tab lifecycle markers passed static verification without changing canvas behavior.

phase-67-local-2026-06-04.summary: MatrixBackground now supports legacy matchMedia listener APIs, missing requestAnimationFrame/cancelAnimationFrame branches, canvas-context fallback, reduced-motion, resize cleanup, and static fallback markers without changing admin runtime behavior.
